# TikoTalks

TikoTalks is the public documentation and brand surface for Tiko Universe.

Core documentation pages:

- https://tikotalks.com/docs — platform overview
- https://tikotalks.com/docs/philosophy — product and engineering philosophy
- https://tikotalks.com/docs/architecture — monorepo, Cloudflare, Worker, storage, and domain architecture
- https://tikotalks.com/docs/apis — public API contract families

Important principles:

- Child-facing apps open immediately; login is never the first screen.
- Tiko uses device-first identity with optional caregiver email recovery.
- Web, iOS, and Android clients consume the same HTTPS JSON APIs.
- Cloudflare Workers own backend authority, provider secrets, D1/R2 bindings, and durable mutations.
- D1 is relational source of truth, R2 is byte source of truth, and KV is cache only.
